title: [codereview-P1 pass2] ccp16_vectors hash_32 and test update: struct import minimal, computation in literal works for generator JSON, pytest passes. Minor: eui64 string parsed? Not yet but vector uses int(1). No correctness issues. P4 opinion: move hash_32 to shared test util.

close_reason: Fixed ccp16_vectors hash_32 computation in generator literal, moved to shared test util in generate.py, updated test for eui64 parsing and spec-consistent XOR hash + n_channels channel calc; pytest now passes for this test; regenerated vectors with independent oracle values. Other test failures out of scope for this bead.
